text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
During summer camp, Eishin Flash senses
something in my troubled gaze as I watch over
her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When she asks me what's wrong, I respond
honestly that I'm trying to remember as much of
these last moments as possible.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I tell her how much I love to see her running,
which gets us reminiscing about our journey thus
far. Eishin Flash confesses that she doesn't want
our time to end just yet either.
